author: y4rr
content:
Spun out of #584. That issue landed the activation / loss / distance / one_hot subset (~29 fns); this is for the remaining surface that needs forwarders to existing modules or new GradFn primitives.

## Remaining functional gap
Most of these have a Module form already in ferrotorch-nn — the forwarder just needs to pull explicit weight/bias args and call the module's forward.

### Conv forwarders
- \`conv1d\`, \`conv2d\`, \`conv3d\` — wrap \`Conv1d\`/\`Conv2d\`/\`Conv3d\` modules
- \`conv_transpose1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\` — wrap the existing transposed convs

### Pool forwarders
- \`avg_pool1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\`, \`max_pool1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\`
- \`adaptive_avg_pool1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\`, \`adaptive_max_pool1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\`
- \`lp_pool1d\`/\`2d\`, \`max_unpool1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\`

### Pad forwarders
- \`pad(input, pad, mode, value)\` with modes: constant, reflect, replicate, circular

### Norm forwarders
- \`batch_norm\`, \`layer_norm\`, \`group_norm\`, \`instance_norm\`, \`local_response_norm\` (LRN)

### Embedding / attention
- \`embedding(input, weight, padding_idx, max_norm, norm_type, scale_grad_by_freq, sparse)\`
- \`embedding_bag(input, weight, offsets, mode, ...)\`
- \`scaled_dot_product_attention(query, key, value, attn_mask, dropout_p, is_causal, scale)\` — wrap existing FlashAttention / vanilla attention

### Need new GradFn primitives
- \`softshrink\`, \`hardshrink\` — need elementwise-mask GradFn (gradient is identity above threshold, zero below)
- \`threshold(x, thresh, value)\` — same
- \`prelu\` — needs broadcast multiply with the per-channel weight + relu mask
- \`smooth_l1_loss\` / \`huber_loss\` — needs piecewise where (|diff| < delta ? quadratic : linear)
- \`nll_loss\` — needs gather-along-dim
- \`gaussian_nll_loss\`, \`poisson_nll_loss\` — composable once log/exp + clamps land

### Specialty
- \`alpha_dropout\`, \`feature_alpha_dropout\` — variance-preserving dropout for SELU
- \`dropout1d\`/\`2d\`/\`3d\` — channel-wise dropout
- \`gumbel_softmax\` — softmax with Gumbel noise
- \`ctc_loss\`, \`triplet_margin_loss\`, \`cosine_embedding_loss\`, \`hinge_embedding_loss\`, \`margin_ranking_loss\`, \`multilabel_*\`, \`multi_margin_loss\`, \`soft_margin_loss\`
